Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Scott David Righthand, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Present in court: Petitioner: Ashlyn T. Kalahele; mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Ashlyn V. Kalahele-Espinoza.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $1,750.000
Attorney's Fees: $288,477.23$ payable to Law Offices of Scott Righthand, PC
Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $304,596.22.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $77,500.00 for repayment of compromised Medi-cal Lien. This amount is to be sent by certified mail or other verifiable Method to: Department of Health Services Recovery Branch- MS 4720
PO Box 997421 Sacramento, CA 95899-7421.
The balance of the settlement $1,156.926 to be paid to a special needs trust under Probate Code section 3604 Attachment 7c(2)(b). $245,307.60 payable by check from Kaiser to Kay Carrigas as Trustee of the Ashlyn V. Kalahele-Espinoza Irrevocable Speical Needs Trust.
$834,118.93 payable by check from Kaiser to Prudencial Assigned Settlement Services Corporation for the purchase of a structured settlement annuity.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor.
Status Hearing Scheduled on February 27, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt and acknowledgment of Order for the Deposit of Money into Special Need Trust, for purchase of Annuity and Probate's Department Approval of Special Needs Trust. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
